steps.title: Identify what the evidence should show
steps.content: The researchers concluded nitrogen fertilizer increases yield. Supporting evidence must demonstrate that nitrogen outperformed the control condition.

steps.title: Check which choice shows this pattern
steps.content:
Choice B — In every year of the experiment, plants treated with the nitrogen fertilizer had a greater yield than did plants treated with the control fertilizer. states that in every year, nitrogen yield exceeded control yield.

The graph confirms this: 2017 ($34 \gt 23$), 2018 ($41 \gt 31$), 2019 ($27 \gt 19$).

This consistent pattern directly supports the researchers' conclusion about nitrogen's effectiveness.

Choice A — In every year of the experiment, plants treated with the nitrogen fertilizer had a yield of at least 30 pounds per acre. fails at 2019 ($27 \lt 30$), while choices C and D describe isolated observations unrelated to the core comparison. That matches Choice B — In every year of the experiment, plants treated with the nitrogen fertilizer had a greater yield than did plants treated with the control fertilizer..
